name: Authority / bug system / bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28
outcome_goal: Drive bugs BUG-CEA99453 to a terminal outcome with explicit evidence and bounded verification.
anti_requirements: Do NOT widen scope outside the listed bugs and authority owner.
Do NOT resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do NOT use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do NOT clean up unrelated issues just because they are nearby.

jobs.label: plan_packet
jobs.description: Lock the execution boundary for Authority / bug system / bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28.
jobs.outcome_goal: One plan artifact names the exact touched files, verification path, and closure boundary before implementation starts.
jobs.prompt:
Read the coordination file `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260428_full.json` and extract packet `bug_resolution_program_20260428_full.wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28`.

Packet contract:
- bug_ids: ["BUG-CEA99453"]
- authority_owner: lane:authority_bug_system
- lane: Authority / bug system (authority_bug_system)
- wave: wave_0_authority_repair
- packet_kind: authority_repair
- cluster: bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28 (bug.resume_context.cluster_key:bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28)
- verification_surface: workflow orient + bug stats/list/search + replay-ready view must all return cleanly for the affected path
- depends_on_wave: none

Write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/PLAN.md` with these sections:
1. Bugs in scope
2. Titles in scope
- Bug failure packet assembly is duplicated between BugTracker and bug_evidence
3. Files to read first
4. Files allowed to change
5. Verification or closure proof required
6. Stop boundary

Use current repo truth, not guesses. Do not edit code in this job.

jobs.label: execute_packet
jobs.description: Implement or close the packet without widening scope.
jobs.outcome_goal: The packet produces either a bounded code fix or a proof-backed closure rationale for every bug in scope.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/PLAN.md` first.

Then implement the narrowest correct path for packet `bug_resolution_program_20260428_full.wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28`.

Rules:
- If the right outcome is FIXED, make the smallest durable change and record exactly what verification will prove it.
- If the right outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, do not force code. Collect the proof and rationale instead.
- Prepare for the closeout job by recording the intended terminal outcome for each bug in `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/EXECUTION.md`.
- Do not resolve bugs in this job.

Done criteria:
- The affected authority path fails closed or succeeds deterministically.
- Bug/operator reads prove the repaired behavior without hangs or silent fallback.
- Each in-scope bug reaches a proof-backed terminal outcome.

Stop boundary: Do not widen into unrelated product work once the bug lane is truthful and auditable.

jobs.label: verify_and_resolve_packet
jobs.description: Run verification, attach bug evidence, and resolve every bug through the bug tracker surface.
jobs.outcome_goal: Each in-scope bug is either left open with a clear blocker or moved to a terminal status with explicit evidence.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/PLAN.md` and `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/EXECUTION.md`.

Then do the narrowest meaningful verification for the packet.

Closeout rules:
- Use `praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence` and `praxis workflow bugs resolve` only.
- If terminal outcome is FIXED, attach attempted_fix evidence and validates_fix evidence before resolution.
- If terminal outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, write the proof-backed rationale to `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-0-authority-repair-authority-bug-system-bug-failure-packet-duplication-2026-04-28/CLOSEOUT.md` and resolve through the bug tracker surface.
- If verification fails, leave the bug open and write the blocker in CLOSEOUT.md.

Verification surface: workflow orient + bug stats/list/search + replay-ready view must all return cleanly for the affected path
Stop boundary: Do not widen into unrelated product work once the bug lane is truthful and auditable.
